text:
Created attachment 200110
Update to 9.5.3

These versions are a maintenance releases and contain bug fixes and regression fixes from this week's security release. For details about the releases, please visit the following website:

https://typo3.org/article/typo3-v953-lts-and-v8722-lts-released/
